verdicts.note: The judicial safety axis is restricted to documented bail, diversion, or professional-formation evidence. A general pledge to consider both public safety and individual rights supplies no enforcement-versus-services placement and cannot justify a score of 0, which must mean genuinely mixed rather than unknown.

Her full-time judge and commissioner service clearly supports the proven-record pole at high confidence, but roughly five years in those roles does not meet the guide's maximal -2 example of long tenure. The scorer's comparative 'only candidate' rationale does not turn a solid record into maximal tenure.
